text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having been through so many races with Mejiro
Ardan, this moment right now feels like some sort
of milestone for us... Such are the thoughts going
through my head one day, when—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pardon my intrusion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, may I consult you for advice?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: This concerns our future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We won the grand prize of a hot springs vacation
for two at a raffle a short while ago—perhaps you
remember?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I believe the tickets are in your possession, and I
wished to speak with you about our future plans
regarding this vacation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Since this moment in time serves as something of
a milestone, I believe I can allow myself to get
into the mood for a vacation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: How do you feel about it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Well, it's rather a simple question.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Would you like to go on vacation together?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Let me rephrase that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's go on vacation together. This is my number one wish as of right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan's trainer, there's no way I can
refuse her "number one wish."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We settle on a date, make the necessary
preparations, and then, before we know it, the
day is upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That was a delightful bath. This must be
what it means to feel cleansed in both body and
soul.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...It appears that we still have some time before
the meal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've heard that the inn is beside the sea. Shall we
take a walk?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What a lovely breeze...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, thank you ever so much for
accompanying me on this trip today.
choice_data_list: Thank you, too, for inviting me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...The very notion of going away on a trip and
letting loose like this would have been
unthinkable for the old me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I must spend my now on the turf, doing what I ought to. "I must live my life as if running across the thin ice of a frozen lake, never stopping to relax for a moment."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...That's what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But now, things are different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: This trip today... has been very fun indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sights I'm seeing, the things I'm learning for
the first time, the idle chitchat, all of it... The
dazzling light of each and every moment has been
impressed upon my heart...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I've come to love the moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It hadn't occurred to me... that living in the
moment could bring such tranquility.
choice_data_list:
You've earned it with all the effort you've put
in, Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...But I'm not the only one working hard. Far from
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's precisely because you were there with me that
I was able to find my way to this moment... That's
what I believe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we start making our way back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Although our vacation has yet to end, a part of
me is already wishing to set off on another trip
someday.
choice_data_list: Where would you like to go?
Where would you like to go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is a little embarrassing, but there are simply
so many places I wish to visit that if I were to start
listing them, I doubt I'd ever be able to stop.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But if I were pressed to offer an answer... I'm
rather fascinated by the thought of traveling
overseas. I would very much like to see some
historical locales and scenic sights.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Europe would be fantastic, as would China. I think
Beijing in particular would be full of places to see.
choice_data_list: Sounds like you've got a lot of traveling to do.
Sounds like you've got a lot of traveling to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I shall have to live quite a long life in order
to complete my checklist.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When the opportunity presents itself, would you
like to go on vacation together again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I expect... it will turn out to be a moment in time
even more exciting than today's.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry, let me rephrase that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's go on vacation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Just the two of us again, someday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that during our time together, Mejiro
Ardan and I have formed an irreplaceable bond...
